subject: Stash unstaged work and clean working tree
description: In /Users/ashleytower/mtl-craft-cocktails-ai, there are 15 modified files and 3 untracked files from prior work (email components, PRD files, a migration). Stash all unstaged changes with `git stash push -m "pre-sprint: email draft components + PRD updates"`. Do NOT discard anything. Then verify `git status` shows a clean tree. The untracked migration `031_add_draft_needs_review_status.sql` and other untracked files should remain (stash doesn't touch untracked unless -u flag). That's fine for now.
